technical_risk.rationale: Assess complexity, architectural impact, technical debt

operational_impact.rationale: Assess deployment complexity, downtime, operational procedures

data_integrity.rationale: Assess data migration risks, integrity constraints, backup requirements

performance_impact.rationale: Assess performance degradation, resource consumption, scalability

security_implications.rationale: Assess attack surface, authentication, authorization, encryption

compliance_requirements.rationale: Assess regulatory impact (SOX, GDPR, ISO), audit requirements

rollback_complexity.rationale: Assess rollback feasibility, data reversibility, recovery time

user_experience.rationale: Assess UI changes, workflow disruption, user training needs

training_requirements.rationale: Assess documentation updates, training materials, support readiness

third_party_dependencies.rationale: Assess external service dependencies, API changes, vendor reliability
